texto: Writing the poems, I came to think that regarding is a form of love, but the regarding is not necessarily accurate. In the poems, people are always misperceiving one another. But misperceptions are a part of being alive to others. You don’t need truth or beauty. All you do is perceive. That’s all you need to have loved and lived fully.
explicacao: Citação de Joy Katz sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Writing the poems, I came to think that regarding is a form of love, but the regarding is not nec…” articula reflexao, beauty, love em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como love e perception.
